_comment: Example access-control / IDOR spec for AccessScannerMain. Copy to a gitignored *.local.json, fill in REAL credentials/sessions (never commit them), and point the cases at endpoints you are authorized to test. An identity may carry a pre-captured `cookie`/`headers`, OR a `login` the scanner performs (it submits that one form per the §5 carve-out; fields are detected deterministically). Confirmed when a request as `identity` returns 2xx containing `mustContain`. identity: null = unauthenticated. Targets the local scripts/vuln-target.py.

cases.name: Missing auth: admin panel without a session
